title: Pod Topology Spread Constraints — What's next
text:
The blog article
Introducing PodTopologySpread
explains
maxSkew
in some detail, as well as covering some advanced usage examples.
Read the
scheduling
section of
the API reference for Pod.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
